title: Industry Partnerships: Collaborating on Research - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Industry Partnerships: Collaborating on Research - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Industry Partnerships: Collaborating on Research
Pushing the bounds of innovation — together
For more than 30 years, Khoury College faculty have engaged in groundbreaking research with leading technology companies, organizations, and government agencies. Leveraging common goals and shared resources, our industry partnerships have yielded significant advances and a range of innovative solutions for sponsor organizations.
Khoury researchers work with our partners to advance their company’s business and technology solutions, through classroom-driven projects, sponsored research, and co-located partnerships. Wherever possible, such collaborations strategically leverage our many institutes and centers that — from protecting critical national security systems to ensuring that CS advancements benefit all of society — harness the power of computing to serve the greater good.
18 research areas
Researchers at Khoury College make transformative contributions to many fields within computer science, collaborating, publishing, leading national and international projects, and participating in leading conferences. Our knowledge and experience ranges from AI to computational biology, data science, human-centered computing, cybersecurity, network science, and more.
Explore our research areas
Institutes and Centers
Researchers work across disciplines to develop practical, scalable applications of technology. With leading academic, industry, and government partners, our Institutes and Centers push the boundaries of computer science.
Explore our Institutes and Centers
Ready to engage?
